com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration

Class Init

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.FullIntegrationBase
      • com.pax.poslink.fullIntegration.Init

  • public class Init
extends FullIntegrationBase
    This is used to communicate with POS Service to init.
    Cross compatible with Semi and Full Integration BroadPOS apps

    • Method Detail

      • init

        public static Init.InitResponse init(Context context,
                                     CommSetting commSetting)

        This is a wrapper to use PosLink to do communication with ManageRequest.TransType = 1, INIT.
        This command is use to initialize PAX terminal. PAX terminal will do internal test/check and init the terminal for transactions. If terminal doesn't receive this command after install, the idle menu will display the "disMsg", when terminal receives this command, the idle menu will display the "ildeMsg"

        This is a sync method.

        Parameters:
        context - App context
        commSetting - Communication setting.
        Returns:
        The InitResponse
